chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. R.A.No. 75 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on CMA 760/2021. 2. For orders on CMA 761/2021. 3. For hearing of main case. 07.11.2025. None has appeared in this Revision throughout the year. None was present in the last three years on 14.04.2025, 24.10.2025, 31.10.2025 and once again today (except 21.02.2022). No intimation is received. It appears that the applicants have lost interest in pursuing this Revision Application which is dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith pending applications. JUDGE Tufail
